headline: This Risk ETF Is Riding Its Best Seven-Day Stretch in a Year
summary: An exchange-traded fund focused on riskier S&P 500 stocks is riding its best seven-day stretch in a year. The Invesco S&P 500 High Beta ETF, which offers exposure to some of the most volatile stocks in the S&P 500, is up another 1%.

headline: Stock Indexes Rally to Record Highs on Peace Deal Hopes and AI Spending

headline: After Three Years of Tracking the AI Capex Cycle These 3 Semiconductor ETFs Sit on Top of the Trade
summary: After three years of hyperscaler capital spending feeding through to chip designers, foundry capacity, and lithography backlogs, the semiconductor ETF complex has separated into distinct buckets. iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SOXX), VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SMH), and First Trust Nasdaq Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:FTXL) are the three broad U.S.-listed vehicles that capture the trade in clean, liquid form. ... headline: Is Applied Materials Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Applied Materials has notably outperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year, and analysts are highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
